title: Automatic dashboard export

posts.author: jablotron (Martin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

we are looking for anything, what could be able to automaticly export whole dashboard to MS Excel format (xlsx) and download it to cloud or just send it as attachment via email.

It should be a pretty cool feature I think.

posts.author: Rodrigo (Rodrigo)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! Even having the option to automate the .pdf export of a dashboard would be amazing

posts.author: vasarmilan (Milán Vásárhelyi ev.)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a developer and I’m thinking of building an App for this purpose (I can automate both PDF and an XSLX export).

If anyone interested, I’d appreciate if you could reach out by email - so I can notify you when there is a prototype to test and look for improvements. Thanks a lot!

posts.author: Tracy (Tracy Emma Pontin)
posts.cookedHtml: What would be quite nice is if you were able to create a ‘page’ within the Monday.com dashboard that you could export. I’m currently having to explain some of the data that i’m exporting out, so i’m having to save the images, then pull into a separate document, label and explain them and then print. It would be much easier if you could export a ‘page’ direct from the monday system.

posts.author: ilg-comex (Iluska)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to automate exporting a PDF from a dashboard panel and sending it by email automatically in a integration?

posts.author: egronberger (Erik Gronberger)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, there isn´t. I have read the whole forum and didn´t find anything that match exactly this need.

posts.author: EMorton (Erik Morton)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding a +1 for this request as well.

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello is any new update on this? I would love this feature as well!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

We’re working on an app to solve this. I’d love to chat with anyone who is facing this issue to better understand the problem and make sure our solution solves it.
For anyone who wants to chat / wants early access, you can reach me at daniel@fantasymedia.io

posts.author: ZackCarter (mr zack carter)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello - I would love to kept informed of this development

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jablotron

I’m not sure if it is still relevant to you, but I came across your post and wanted to share it. Recently, we had a similar case from a client – they asked to make custom board snapshots in xls📷. I’ve described it here. I hope it will be helpful.
